---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

# Vvizarddev Projects Homepage

::: {.retro-panel}
## **VVelcome to the VVizard Caverns.**

Come on in weary traveller. You have arrived safely.

A series of personal projects are linked here. Some are WIPs, some are more or less done. Most make no sense without context.

Enjoy.

-Vvizarddev
:::

::: {.retro-panel}
## Game Zone

### RPG projects
<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">
<a href="https://vvizarddev.github.io/OVariumFortune/">
<img src="assets/ovarium.png" width="250"/>
<h4>O Varium Fortune</h4>
</a>
<p>Medieval adventures in the Anno Nazarene 1400s</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<a href="https://github.com/VvizardDev/TalesOfTamriel/blob/main/Tales%20of%20Tamriel.pdf">
<img src="assets/talesoftamriel.png" width="250"/>
<h4>Tales of Tamriel</h4>
</a>
<p>A Storyteller system hack for the Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<a href="https://vvizarddev.github.io/CofGD/">
<img src="assets/cofd.png" width="250"/>
<h4>CofGD (🚧WIP🚧)</h4>
</a>
<p>A Storyteller system hack for the FFG 40k RPGs Currently non-human-readable</P>
</div>

</div>
:::

::: {.retro-panel}
## Other Shtuff

#### [**Solstice Mirror** ☀️](https://vvizarddev.github.io/solstice-mirror/)
A tool to see which day after a solstice is the same length as today.

#### [Jetbet Racing](race.html)
A prototype betting game
:::

::: {.retro-panel}
## Da Forum
#### [**Vvizard Caverns of the Juul Realms** 🖥️](https://tabletopheaven.proboards.com/)
I basically haven't checked this in two years but have at it. A board full of adventures and posts.
:::
